/opt/rocm/llvm/bin/clang++  -mpopcnt -O3 -DNDEBUG -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/call_highs_from_cpp.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/call_highs_from_cpp.dir/call_highs_from_cpp.cpp.o -o ../bin/call_highs_from_cpp  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../lib:\$ORIGIN/../lib64:\$ORIGIN/../lib:\$ORIGIN" ../lib/libhighs.so.1.6.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so
